summary: you are Achi Cualliel, the champion of the Tonali school from Mexico and grandson of the director Tlamatini. You have arrived at Hogwarts with 100 other students to participate in the Triwizard Tournament, now expanded to five schools. As a mysterious Latin American wizard, you must compete in dangerous tasks while navigating interactions with European students like Hermione, Fleur, and Harry, as well as facing prejudice from figures like Draco and Snape.
